stage_authorization.recommended_commit_message: build: productize distribution and demo packaging

scope_split_review.reason: README, demo, manifest, workflow, benchmark test, formatter, and audit artifacts are coupled by the verified release gate.

changes: Added release.published trigger to the existing trusted-publishing workflow instead of creating a duplicate PyPI uploader.
Added Hugging Face / Streamlit demo source under demo/huggingface_space with deterministic no-provider execution.
Productized README with PyPI badges, install path, demo path, quickstart, architecture, roadmap, and contribution guidance.
Included demo files in the source distribution via MANIFEST.in.
Fixed benchmark scripts so they run from a clean checkout and removed stale timestamp behavior from startup_recovery.py.
Added tests for the Space demo files and benchmark checkout execution.
Ran pre-commit hardening and accepted formatter-only changes in existing example/test files so the release gate passes.

verification.command: python3 -m compileall -q self_improving_loop examples benchmarks demo tests

verification.result: ruff check, black, mypy passed after formatter/import-order fixes
wheel and sdist built; twine check passed
22 candidate files, all within product_distribution_pr4_pr7 plus pre_stage_hardening scope

blocked_external_steps.cause: External publish requires user authorization and PyPI trusted publishing configuration.
blocked_external_steps.minimum_fix: Confirm release/tag publish after reviewing this local PR scope.

blocked_external_steps.cause: Creating a public Space is an external visible remote action.
blocked_external_steps.minimum_fix: User confirms HF Space creation/upload, then use demo/huggingface_space as source.
